{{Quote|Listen, bolo-ball is really gaining popularity with local toddlers. I think that twenty years from now, Coruscant will be a feared bolo-ball planet.|Jipoly Numifolis|<ref name="Holo" />}}
'''Jipoly Numifolis''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] player for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Team Coruscant|limmie team]]. The issue of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News']] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]] reported that the inexperienced Team Coruscant was soundly defeated by the planet [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] [[Team Fondor|team]] in the opening round of the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]; the score was three to one at Coruscant's own [[BlasTech Gikosphere|stadium]]. Although the loss disappointed them, Numifolis told HoloNet News [[Journalist/Legends|reporters]] that they had high hopes for the future of limmie on Coruscant, a planet that did not care for the sport on the whole. The captain theorized that because the next generation of [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] had taken to the sport, by [[2 BBY/Legends|twenty years' time]], their team would have a much better pool of players, making it a force to be reckoned with.<ref name="Holo" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jipoly Numifolis was mentioned in an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News feed]], [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|Volume 531, Issue 47]]. The issue was written in an [[in-universe]] perspective,<ref name="Holo" /> authored by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]],<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and released on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
